title: thelypteris subcuneata
intro: Thelypteris subcuneata, also known as the subcuneate or wedge-shaped fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Thelypteris subcuneata include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as potentially lowering blood pressure and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris subcuneata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
